name: sulis-execution
description: Work Package Executor + Resumable Train — atomic per-WP lifecycle (worktree → RGB → Step 6.5 code-review → commit → push) plus a per-batch train (rebase → CI → merge → deploy → Step 10.5 + Step 11 gates). Self-heals via OODA + Five Whys. See CHANGELOG.md for version history.
